data.name: Agents.Surface.Empty.Message
data.value: No Agent record is available for this tenant yet.

data.name: Agents.Surface.FilteredEmpty.Message
data.value: No entries match the current filters.

data.name: Agents.Surface.Error.Message
data.value: Agent data could not be loaded. Try again once the service is reachable.

data.name: Agents.Surface.PermissionDenied.Message
data.value: You are not authorized to administer Agents for this tenant.

data.name: Agents.Surface.Stale.Message
data.value: The latest readiness evidence is stale. Refresh to re-evaluate.

data.name: Agents.Readiness.Blocker.Unknown
data.value: An unrecognized activation blocker is present.

data.name: Agents.Readiness.Blocker.MissingDisplayName
data.value: Add a display name for hexa.

data.name: Agents.Readiness.Blocker.InvalidInstructions
data.value: Fix the Agent Instructions — they do not meet validity requirements.

data.name: Agents.Readiness.Blocker.MissingPartyIdentity
data.value: Link a Party identity so hexa has an attributable participant.

data.name: Agents.Readiness.Blocker.MissingProviderSelection
data.value: Select a Provider and model for hexa.

data.name: Agents.Readiness.Blocker.ProviderUnavailable
data.value: The selected Provider or model is not currently available.

data.name: Agents.Readiness.Blocker.MissingResponseMode
data.value: Choose a response mode for hexa.

data.name: Agents.Readiness.Blocker.MissingApproverPolicy
data.value: Configure an approver policy for confirmation mode.

data.name: Agents.Readiness.Blocker.ApproverPolicyUnresolvable
data.value: The configured approver source cannot be resolved.

data.name: Agents.Readiness.Blocker.MissingContentSafetyPolicy
data.value: Configure a Content Safety Policy before activating hexa.

data.name: Agents.Overview.Description
data.value: Readiness, lifecycle, response mode, Provider/model, and activation blockers for hexa in this tenant.

data.name: Agents.Overview.Blockers.None
data.value: No activation blockers — all required readiness gates pass.

data.name: Agents.ProviderCatalog.Description
data.value: Provider and model options, capability metadata, readiness, and configured state. Secrets are never shown.

data.name: Agents.ProviderCatalog.Filter.SelectableOnly
data.value: Selectable for new active use only

data.name: Agents.Config.Description
data.value: Configure identity, instructions, Provider/model, response mode, approver policy, lifecycle, and content safety for hexa.

data.name: Agents.Config.Instructions.Invalid
data.value: Instructions do not meet validity requirements.

data.name: Agents.Config.ContentSafety.Present
data.value: A Content Safety Policy is configured.

data.name: Agents.Config.ContentSafety.Absent
data.value: No Content Safety Policy is configured.

data.name: Agents.Config.Activation.Deferred
data.value: Activation is performed from the deferred command surface; this screen shows readiness only.

data.name: Agents.Config.ResponseMode.FutureOnlyNote
data.value: Changing the response mode affects future Agent Calls only; prior interactions are never rewritten.

data.name: Agents.ApproverPolicy.Description
data.value: Approver sources used to confirm generated content before it reaches a Conversation in confirmation mode.

data.name: Agents.ApproverPolicy.NotApplicable
data.value: Not applicable — an approver policy is only required in confirmation mode.

data.name: Agents.ApproverPolicy.Blocked
data.value: Blocked — an approver source is missing, ambiguous, or unavailable.

data.name: Agents.ConversationCall.Description
data.value: Call hexa from a Conversation and follow the call status — pending, blocked, failed, or posted.

data.name: Agents.CallStatus.Reason.Denied
data.value: You do not have permission to call hexa in this Conversation.

data.name: Agents.CallStatus.Reason.Blocked
data.value: The provider or a dependency is unavailable. The call is blocked.

data.name: Agents.CallStatus.Reason.ContextBlocked
data.value: The Conversation context could not be built safely.

data.name: Agents.CallStatus.Reason.GenerationFailed
data.value: The response could not be generated.

data.name: Agents.CallStatus.Reason.PostingFailed
data.value: The response could not be posted to the Conversation.

data.name: Agents.CallStatus.Reason.Unknown
data.value: The call could not be completed for an unrecognized reason.

data.name: Agents.CallStatus.Reason.ContextNotFresh
data.value: The Conversation context could not be read fresh enough.

data.name: Agents.CallStatus.Reason.ExceedsModelBudget
data.value: The context exceeds the model budget.

data.name: Agents.CallStatus.Reason.ModelBudgetUnavailable
data.value: The model budget could not be determined.

data.name: Agents.CallStatus.Reason.ProviderDisabled
data.value: The selected provider or model is disabled.

data.name: Agents.CallStatus.Reason.InvalidContext
data.value: The context could not be prepared for generation.

data.name: Agents.CallStatus.Reason.ContentSafetyBlocked
data.value: Content safety blocked the generated content.

data.name: Agents.CallStatus.Reason.PolicyFailure
data.value: The content-safety policy could not be evaluated.

data.name: Agents.CallStatus.Reason.PartyIdentityUnavailable
data.value: The Agent's Party identity is unavailable.

data.name: Agents.CallStatus.Reason.MembershipRejected
data.value: The Conversation rejected the Agent's participation.

data.name: Agents.CallStatus.Reason.Stale
data.value: A required dependency could not be read fresh enough.

data.name: Agents.CallStatus.Reason.Unauthorized
data.value: You are not authorized for a required dependency.

data.name: Agents.CallStatus.Reason.SourceConversationAccess
data.value: Access to the Source Conversation is required.

data.name: Agents.CallStatus.Reason.AgentPartyIdentity
data.value: The Agent's Party identity is required.

data.name: Agents.CallStatus.Reason.ProviderModelReadiness
data.value: The provider or model is not ready.

data.name: Agents.CallStatus.Reason.ResponsePolicy
data.value: The response policy is not resolvable.

data.name: Agents.ConversationCall.Panel.Implication.Automatic
data.value: Automatic posts directly to the Conversation.

data.name: Agents.ConversationCall.Panel.Status.Failed
data.value: The call did not complete. See the status for details.

data.name: Agents.ConversationCall.Feedback.Unavailable
data.value: Automatic calling is unavailable on this view. Review-only status is shown.

data.name: Agents.ProposalQueue.Description
data.value: Find Proposed Agent Replies that need your action before they post to a Conversation.

data.name: Agents.ProposalQueue.StartNewCall
data.value: This proposal can no longer post. Start a new Agent Call if a response is still needed.

data.name: Agents.ProposalEditor.Status.Edited
data.value: Your edit was saved as a new version.

data.name: Agents.ProposalEditor.Status.NotAuthorized
data.value: You are not authorized to edit this proposed reply.

data.name: Agents.ProposalEditor.Status.Unavailable
data.value: The edit could not be saved. Try again once the service is reachable.

data.name: Agents.ProposalRegenerator.PriorVersionsPreserved
data.value: Prior generated and edited versions are preserved.

data.name: Agents.ProposalRegenerator.Status.Regenerated
data.value: A new regenerated version was added.

data.name: Agents.ProposalRegenerator.Status.NotAuthorized
data.value: You are not authorized to regenerate this proposed reply.

data.name: Agents.ProposalRegenerator.Status.Unavailable
data.value: The reply could not be regenerated. Try again once the service is reachable.

data.name: Agents.ProposalRegenerator.Status.NotPending
data.value: This proposed reply is no longer pending and cannot be regenerated.

data.name: Agents.ProposalApprover.SelectedVersion
data.value: Selected version will be approved for posting.

data.name: Agents.ProposalApprover.Status.Approved
data.value: The selected version was approved and is not yet posted.

data.name: Agents.ProposalApprover.Status.PostingPending
data.value: The selected version is approved and posting is pending.

data.name: Agents.ProposalApprover.Status.Posted
data.value: The selected version was posted to the Conversation.

data.name: Agents.ProposalApprover.Status.NotAuthorized
data.value: You are not authorized to approve this proposed reply.

data.name: Agents.ProposalApprover.Status.NotPending
data.value: This proposed reply is no longer pending and cannot be approved.

data.name: Agents.ProposalApprover.Status.PostingFailed
data.value: The selected version was approved, but posting failed.

data.name: Agents.ProposalApprover.Status.Unavailable
data.value: The approval could not be completed. Try again once the service is reachable.

data.name: Agents.ProposalRejector.PriorVersionsPreserved
data.value: All versions are preserved for audit.

data.name: Agents.ProposalRejector.Status.NotAuthorized
data.value: You are not authorized to reject this proposed reply.

data.name: Agents.ProposalRejector.Status.NotPending
data.value: This proposed reply is no longer pending and cannot be rejected.

data.name: Agents.ProposalRejector.Status.Unavailable
data.value: The rejection could not be completed. Try again once the service is reachable.

data.name: Agents.ProposalAbandoner.PriorVersionsPreserved
data.value: All versions are preserved for audit.

data.name: Agents.ProposalAbandoner.Status.NotAuthorized
data.value: You are not authorized to abandon this proposed reply.

data.name: Agents.ProposalAbandoner.Status.NotPending
data.value: This proposed reply is no longer pending and cannot be abandoned.

data.name: Agents.ProposalAbandoner.Status.Unavailable
data.value: The abandonment could not be completed. Try again once the service is reachable.

data.name: Agents.ProposalDetail.Description
data.value: Review the proposed reply, its version history, and the approval decision with full context.

data.name: Agents.ProposalDetail.NotFound.Message
data.value: No proposal is available here, or you are not authorized to view it.

data.name: Agents.ProposalDetail.SelectionLock.Message
data.value: A newer version is available. Review it before approving.

data.name: Agents.ProposalDetail.Transition.GenerationFailed
data.value: Generation failed. No proposed reply was created.

data.name: Agents.ProposalDetail.Transition.ProposalCreated
data.value: A proposed reply was created and awaits your action.

data.name: Agents.ProposalDetail.Transition.ProposalExpired
data.value: This proposal expired. It can no longer be approved or posted.

data.name: Agents.ProposalDetail.Transition.ApprovalPosted
data.value: The approved version was posted to the Conversation.

data.name: Agents.ProposalDetail.Transition.PostingFailed
data.value: Posting the approved version failed. It was not posted.

data.name: Agents.ProposalDetail.Transition.PermissionDenied
data.value: You are not authorized to act on this proposal.

data.name: Agents.ProposalDetail.Transition.StaleApprovalBlocked
data.value: A newer version appeared. Approval of your earlier selection is blocked until you review it.

data.name: Agents.Surface.Degraded.Message
data.value: This data completed but is stale. Refresh to re-evaluate; it is not a fresh result.

data.name: Agents.Surface.Unavailable.Message
data.value: A required dependency is unavailable. Operational status cannot be shown right now.

data.name: Agents.OperationalStatus.Recovery.ConfigureProvider
data.value: Select an enabled provider and model for hexa, then retry the call.

data.name: Agents.OperationalStatus.Recovery.LinkPartyIdentity
data.value: Link a valid Party identity to hexa so it has an attributable participant.

data.name: Agents.OperationalStatus.Recovery.FixPolicy
data.value: Review the Agent configuration and approver policy, then re-enable hexa.

data.name: Agents.OperationalStatus.Recovery.WaitForApproval
data.value: An approver must review the pending proposal before it can post.

data.name: Agents.OperationalStatus.Recovery.RetryGeneration
data.value: Retry the generation or posting once the failure cause is resolved.

data.name: Agents.OperationalStatus.Recovery.InspectAudit
data.value: Inspect the support-safe audit evidence for this Agent Call.

data.name: Agents.OperationalStatus.Recovery.StartNewCall
data.value: This work can no longer post. Start a new Agent Call to continue.

data.name: Agents.OperationalStatus.Description
data.value: Diagnose readiness, calls, proposals, failures, and posting outcomes.

data.name: Agents.Audit.Description
data.value: Inspect support-safe, metadata-only audit evidence for Agent Calls.

data.name: Agents.Audit.MetadataOnly
data.value: Metadata only. No message content is recorded.

data.name: Agents.Audit.PostedAuditPending
data.value: Posted with audit pending. Durable audit evidence is not yet available.

data.name: Agents.Audit.Landing.Description
data.value: Audit evidence is reached from an Agent Call. Open a Conversation invocation, proposal, operational status, or posted response to inspect its support-safe evidence.

data.name: Agents.Audit.EntryPoint.PostedResponse
data.value: Audit is also reachable from a posted response reference.

data.name: Agents.CallStatus.Reason.LaunchReadiness
data.value: Production-like launch readiness is not enabled.

data.name: Agents.LaunchReadiness.Description
data.value: Record the launch-readiness decisions that gate production-like generation: launch metrics, latency targets, and cost-control posture.

data.name: Agents.LaunchReadiness.Latency.Empty
data.value: No latency targets are recorded yet.

data.name: Agents.LaunchReadiness.Metrics.Empty
data.value: No launch metrics are recorded yet.

data.name: Agents.LaunchReadiness.Blocker.Unknown
data.value: An unrecognized launch-readiness requirement is unmet.

data.name: Agents.LaunchReadiness.Blocker.MissingContentSafetyPolicy
data.value: No active Content Safety Policy is configured.

data.name: Agents.LaunchReadiness.Blocker.MissingContextPolicy
data.value: No Conversation Context Policy is in force.

data.name: Agents.LaunchReadiness.Blocker.IncompleteLaunchMetricDefinition
data.value: A launch metric is missing a required field.

data.name: Agents.LaunchReadiness.Blocker.MissingAutomaticLatencyTarget
data.value: No Automatic Response Mode latency target is recorded.

data.name: Agents.LaunchReadiness.Blocker.MissingConfirmationLatencyTarget
data.value: No Confirmation Response Mode latency target is recorded.
